title: Refreshing Herbal Canadian Kanten Agar Noodles
description: A post-workout Canadian dish featuring kanten-agar noodles infused with herbal flavors, this recipe is a refreshing and healthy option for a snack or light meal. It is also Buddhist-temple-friendly due to its vegan and emulsified ingredients.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the kanten-agar powder and water to create a gel-like substance.
In a medium saucepan, combine the lemon juice, maple syrup, dried mint leaves, and dried chamomile flowers.
Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the kanten-agar mixture to the saucepan and stir constantly until the mixture thickens.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the coconut oil and salt.
Let the mixture cool to room temperature, then refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Once the mixture has chilled, use a fork to flake it into noodle-like strands.
Serve the noodles chilled, garnished with additional dried mint leaves if desired.
